'''鈭歠-ng-dh-dh''' ('''kafangdhedhoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:chaoticize|chaoticize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-ng-dh-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:chaoticize|chaoticize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歠-ng-dh-dh
|-
! Lemma
| kafangdhedhoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thifangdhedhoko|thifangdhedhoko]] || [[word:jifangdhedhoko|jifangdhedhoko]] || [[word:shifangdhedhoko|shifangdhedhoko]] || [[word:kifangdhedhoko|kifangdhedhoko]]
|-

|-

|-
